leadText: Ballimere Lake (Japanese: ボールレイクの湖畔 Shore of Ball Lake) is a location in the Galar region. It contains Dyna Tree Hill and connects to the Giant's Bed to the north and Lakeside Cave to the northeast. The Mythical Pokémon Keldeo can be caught here.
